content.text:
```json
{
  "research_question": "How can large language models be integrated with optimization-based scenario analysis and machine learning surrogates to enhance the interpretability and computational efficiency of renewable energy system modeling for non-expert stakeholders?",
  "GroundTruthDatasets": ["German LULUCF sector", "BENOPTex"],
  "GroundTruthModels": ["Random Forest", "XGBoost", "Deep Neural Networks", "GPT-4", "RE-LLM"],
  "GroundTruthMetrics": ["R2", "RMSE", "SHAP"]
}
```

```json
{
  "research_question": "How can multi-value alignment of LLMs be improved by mitigating parameter interference among conflicting human values through value decorrelation and extrapolation?",
  "GroundTruthDatasets": ["Anthropic-HH", "BeaverTails-10k", "Honest"],
  "GroundTruthModels": ["LLaMA2-7B", "DPO", "DPO-SeqT", "DPO-LW", "SOUP", "MODPO", "MVA"],
  "GroundTruthMetrics": ["Reward Model Scores", "Winrate", "Pareto Frontier", "Cosine Similarity", "Euclidean Distance"]
}
```

```json
{
  "research_question": "How does prompt specificity (varying from vague to detailed) affect the reasoning performance of large language models across different tasks and prompting strategies?",

  "GroundTruthModels": ["GPT-4", "O3-mini", "GPT-2-medium", "GPT-3.5"],
  "GroundTruthMetrics": ["accuracy", "perplexity", "semantic equivalence"]
}
```

```json
{

}
```

```json
{
  "research_question": "Can an RRAM-based analog in-memory computing architecture combining crossbar arrays with Analog Content Addressable Memory (ACAM) efficiently accelerate both linear and non-linear operations in CNNs and LLMs while eliminating ADCs and maintaining high accuracy under device noise?",

  "GroundTruthMetrics": ["Accuracy", "Energy efficiency", "Speedup", "MSE", "Pearson Correlation Coefficient", "Matthews Correlation Coefficient"]
}
```

